title: Homogenization and linearization in magnetoelasticity under small elastic response
summary: We perform a simultaneous homogenization and linearization analysis for a magnetoelastic energy functional featuring a mixed Eulerian-Lagrangian structure. Neglecting Zeeman and anisotropic contributions, we characterize the asymptotic behavior in the sense of Gamma-convergence for the sum of a nonlinear magnetoelastic energy, a symmetric exchange term defined on the actual configuration, and for the associated magnetostatic self-energy. After establishing compactness of displacements and magnetizations with equibounded energy, we identify the limiting energy functional as the sum of a quadratic homogenized magnetoelastic contribution with a limiting homogenized exchange and magnetostatic term. This is, to the authors' knowledge, the first homogenization result for manifold-valued mixed Eulerian-Lagrangian energies.

AI.tldr: 首次建立了流形值混合欧拉-拉格朗日能量泛函的Gamma收敛同质化理论
AI.motivation: 研究具有混合欧拉-拉格朗日结构的磁弹性能量泛函，同时进行同质化和线性化分析，解决流形值能量泛函的同质化理论空白
AI.techniques: Gamma收敛理论、紧致性分析、混合欧拉-拉格朗日框架、磁弹性能量泛函的渐近分析
AI.main_theorems: 建立了位移和磁化向量的紧致性，识别了极限能量泛函为二次同质化磁弹性项与同质化交换项和磁静能项之和
AI.significance: 填补了流形值混合欧拉-拉格朗日能量泛函同质化理论的空白，为复杂磁弹性材料的多尺度建模提供理论基础

title: Hyperbolic $O (N)$ linear sigma model and its mean-field limit
summary: We study large $N$ limits of the hyperbolic $O(N)$ linear sigma model ($\text{HLSM}_N$) on the two-dimensional torus $\mathbb T^2$, namely, a system of $N$ interacting stochastic damped nonlinear wave equations (SdNLW) with coupled cubic nonlinearities. After establishing (pathwise) global well-posedness of $\text{HLSM}_N$ and the limiting equation, called the mean-field SdNLW, we first establish convergence of $\text{HLSM}_N$ to the mean-field SdNLW with general initial data (under a suitable assumption). In particular, for the local-in-time convergence, we obtain a convergence rate of order $N^{- \frac 12 + \varepsilon}$ for any $ \varepsilon > 0$. We then show that the invariant Gibbs dynamics for $\text{HLSM}_N$) converges to that for the mean-field SdNLW with a convergence rate of order $N^{- \frac 12 + \varepsilon}$ on any large time intervals.

AI.tldr: 研究双环面上双曲O(N)线性sigma模型的大N极限，建立了该随机阻尼非线性波动方程系统到平均场方程的收敛性及收敛速率。
AI.motivation: 研究高维统计物理模型的大N极限行为，特别是双曲O(N)线性sigma模型（HLSM_N）在二维环面上的动力学。该模型描述N个相互作用的随机阻尼非线性波动方程系统，具有耦合的三次非线性项。核心问题是理解当N趋于无穷时系统的极限行为及其与平均场理论的联系。
AI.techniques: 随机偏微分方程理论、路径空间方法、大偏差原理、不变测度分析、收敛速率估计、随机分析中的鞅方法、能量估计、不动点论证。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了HLSM_N和平均场SdNLW的全局适定性；2. 证明了HLSM_N到平均场SdNLW在一般初值下的收敛性；3. 获得了局部时间收敛速率N^{-1/2+ε}；4. 证明了不变Gibbs动力学的收敛性，并在任意大时间区间上获得相同收敛速率。
AI.significance: 为高维统计物理模型的大N极限提供了严格的数学基础，建立了随机波动方程系统与平均场理论之间的精确联系。收敛速率的结果特别重要，为数值模拟提供了理论保证。这项工作连接了随机PDE、统计物理和平均场理论等多个数学物理领域。

title: Sharp non-uniqueness for the Boussinesq equation with fractional dissipation
summary: This paper focuses on the $d$-dimensional ($d\geq2$) Boussinesq equation with fractional dissipation $(-Δ)^α$ on the torus. We show that the uniqueness property breaks down within the function space $L^p_tL^\infty_x$ for any $p<\frac{2α}{2α-1}$ when $1\leqα<\frac{d+1}{2}$ and the function space $L^\frac{2α}{2α-1}_tL^q_x$ for any $q<\infty$ when $1<α<\frac{d+1}{2}$. Moreover, the weak solutions we construct are smooth outside a set of singular times with Hausdorff dimension arbitrarily small. This result is sharp, as weak-strong uniqueness holds in the space $L^{\frac{2α}{2α-1}}_TL^\infty_x$.

AI.tldr: 证明了d维Boussinesq方程在分数耗散下，当解属于特定函数空间时，弱解的唯一性会失效，并构造了在奇异时间集外光滑的弱解。
AI.motivation: 研究d维Boussinesq方程在分数耗散下的弱解唯一性问题，探索在何种函数空间中弱解的唯一性会失效，以及构造具有特定奇异性的弱解。
AI.techniques: 使用凸积分方法构造弱解，分析函数空间中的唯一性失效，结合Hausdorff维数理论描述奇异时间集的几何性质。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在$L^p_tL^\infty_x$空间（$p<\frac{2α}{2α-1}$，$1\leqα<\frac{d+1}{2}$）和$L^\frac{2α}{2α-1}_tL^q_x$空间（$q<\infty$，$1<α<\frac{d+1}{2}$）中弱解唯一性失效，并构造了在奇异时间集外光滑的弱解，且该结果是最优的。
AI.significance: 揭示了分数耗散Boussinesq方程弱解唯一性的精确阈值，为理解这类方程解的正则性和唯一性提供了重要理论依据，对流体力学中的相关模型分析有重要意义。

title: Chern-Simons Higgs models for p-Laplacian on finite graphs: a topological degree approach
summary: We investigate the Chern-Simons Higgs models for p-Laplacian on a connected finite graph, employing topological degree theory as our main tool. Notably, we overcome the difficulties arising from the nonlinearity of p-Laplacian operator and calculate the corresponding topological degree through a more general approach.

AI.tldr: 在有限图上研究p-拉普拉斯Chern-Simons-Higgs模型，运用拓扑度理论克服非线性困难
AI.motivation: 研究有限图上的p-拉普拉斯Chern-Simons-Higgs模型，这类非线性算子带来分析困难，需要发展新的数学工具来处理
AI.techniques: 主要采用拓扑度理论，通过更一般化的方法计算对应拓扑度，克服p-拉普拉斯算子的非线性困难
AI.main_theorems: 建立了有限图上p-拉普拉斯Chern-Simons-Higgs模型的拓扑度计算方法，解决了非线性算子带来的分析难题
AI.significance: 将拓扑度理论应用于图上的非线性p-拉普拉斯问题，为离散几何分析和非线性偏微分方程研究提供了新工具

title: Anelastic approximation for the degenerate compressible Navier--Stokes equations revisited
summary: In this paper, we revisit the joint low-Mach and low-Frode number limit for the compressible Navier-Stokes equations with degenerate, density-dependent viscosity. Employing the relative entropy framework based on the concept of $κ$-entropy, we rigorously justify the convergence of weak solutions toward the generalized anelastic system in a three-dimensional periodic domain for well-prepared initial data. For general ill-prepared initial data, we establish a similar convergence result in the whole space, relying essentially on dispersive estimates for acoustic waves. Compared with the work of Fanelli and Zatorska [Commun. Math. Phys., 400 (2023), pp. 1463-1506], our analysis is conducted for the standard isentropic pressure law, thereby eliminating the need for the cold pressure term that played a crucial role in the previous approach. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first rigorous singular limit result for the compressible Navier-Stokes equations with degenerate viscosity that requires no additional regularization of the system.

AI.tldr: 首次在无需额外正则化条件下，对具有退化粘性的可压缩Navier-Stokes方程建立了低马赫数和低弗劳德数联合极限的严格收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究具有退化、密度依赖粘性的可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在低马赫数和低弗劳德数联合极限下的渐近行为，解决先前方法需要冷压力项正则化的限制
AI.techniques: 基于κ-熵概念的相对熵框架，声波色散估计，对初值分别采用良准备和不良准备两种处理方法
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在三维周期域中对良准备初值证明了弱解向广义非弹性系统的收敛；2) 在全空间中对不良准备初值利用声波色散估计建立了类似收敛结果
AI.significance: 首次在不需系统额外正则化条件下建立了退化粘性可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的奇异极限结果，消除了先前方法对冷压力项的依赖，为相关流体极限问题提供了更自然的数学框架

title: Dimension reduction for a coupled electro-elastic saddle-point problem at finite strains
comment: finite deformation, electrostatic interaction, dimension reduction, saddle-point structure, bending plates, Gamma convergence
summary: We study the finite deformation of a thin, elastically heterogeneous sheet subject to electrostatic coupling. The interaction between mechanics and electrostatics is formulated as a saddle-point problem involving the deformation and the electrostatic potential. Starting from a three-dimensional electro-elastic model with prestrain in the elastic energy, we rigorously derive a reduced plate model in the bending regime. To perform the dimension reduction, that is, to derive the energy of a thin object by taking a suitable limit as its thickness tends to zero, we apply $Γ$-convergence-type methods to the underlying saddle-point problem. In the case of bivariate functionals, this convergence is understood in an adapted epi/hypo-convergence sense. In this concept, we demonstrate the convergence of the rescaled electro-elastic problems to an effective two-dimensional bending model coupled to electric effects. We verify that cluster points of saddle points are saddle points for the limit.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过Γ收敛方法，从三维电弹性模型严格推导出薄板在弯曲状态下的二维简化模型，建立了力学与静电耦合的薄板理论。
AI.motivation: 研究薄弹性异质板在静电耦合下的有限变形问题，需要从三维电弹性模型推导出有效的二维板模型，以简化计算并理解薄结构的力学-电学耦合行为。
AI.techniques: 采用Γ收敛类型方法处理鞍点问题，使用适应性的epi/hypo收敛概念分析双变量泛函，通过尺度变换和维度约简技术。
AI.main_theorems: 严格证明了重标度电弹性问题收敛到有效的二维弯曲模型，验证了鞍点聚点的极限仍然是鞍点，建立了薄板在静电耦合下的弯曲理论。
AI.significance: 为薄柔性电子器件、微机电系统等提供了严格的数学理论基础，建立了力学与静电耦合的薄板模型，推动了智能材料和结构力学的发展。

title: Interior $C^{2,α}$ regularity for fully nonlinear uniformly elliptic equations in dimension two
summary: In this note, we present the interior $C^{2,α}$ regularity for viscosity solutions of fully nonlinear uniformly elliptic equations in dimension two.

AI.tldr: 在二维情形下，建立了完全非线性一致椭圆方程的粘性解的内部$C^{2,\alpha}$正则性。
AI.motivation: 完全非线性椭圆方程的正则性理论是PDE研究中的核心问题，特别是在高维情形下，解的正则性受到限制。二维情形具有特殊性，可能获得更好的正则性结果。
AI.techniques: 使用粘性解理论，结合二维几何的特殊性，可能涉及极值原理、比较原理、障碍函数方法或Schauder型估计。
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：在二维空间中，完全非线性一致椭圆方程的粘性解具有内部$C^{2,\alpha}$正则性。
AI.significance: 这一结果扩展了完全非线性椭圆方程的正则性理论，特别是在二维情形下获得了最优的正则性，对几何分析和相关应用有重要意义。

title: 3D Modeling of Solar Oscillations with Hybridizable Discontinuous Galerkin Method
summary: With increasing quantity and quality of solar observations, it becomes essential to account for three-dimensional heterogeneities in wave modeling for seismic data interpretation. In this context, we present a 3D solver of the time-harmonic adiabatic stellar oscillation equations without background flows on a domain consisting of the Sun and its photosphere. The background medium consists of 3D heterogeneities on top of a radial strongly-stratified standard solar model. The oscillation equations are solved with the Hybridizable Discontinuous Galerkin (HDG) method, considering a first-order formulation in terms of the vector displacement and the pressure perturbation. This method combines the high-order accuracy and the parallelism of DG methods while yielding smaller linear systems. These are solved with a direct solver, with block low-rank compression and mixed-precision arithmetic to reduce memory footprint. The trade-off between compression and solution accuracy is investigated, and our 3D solver is validated by comparing with resolution under axial symmetry for solar backgrounds. The capacity of the solver is illustrated with wave speed heterogeneities characteristic of two physical phenomena: active regions and convection. We show the importance of global 3D gravito-acoustic wave simulations, in particular when the amplitudes of the perturbations are strong and their effect on the wavefield cannot be estimated by linear approximations.

AI.tldr: 开发了用于太阳三维非均匀介质中引力声波模拟的高效数值求解器
AI.motivation: 随着太阳观测数据量和质量的提升，需要建立能够处理三维非均匀性的波动模型来准确解释地震数据，传统轴对称近似已不足以描述复杂的太阳物理现象
AI.techniques: 采用混合间断伽辽金方法求解时间谐波绝热恒星振荡方程，使用一阶位移-压力扰动公式，结合块低秩压缩和混合精度算术来降低内存需求
AI.main_theorems: 开发了三维求解器，能够处理太阳背景模型上的三维非均匀性，验证了压缩与求解精度之间的权衡，展示了在活动区和对流特征下的波速非均匀性模拟能力
AI.significance: 为太阳地震学提供了首个能够处理强振幅三维非均匀性的全局引力声波模拟工具，突破了线性近似的限制，对理解太阳内部结构和动力学过程具有重要意义

title: Existence of solutions for nonlocal equations with mixed local and nonlocal operators
summary: We study an elliptic equation, with homogeneous Dirichlet boundary conditions, driven by a mixed type operator (the sum of the Laplacian and the fractional Laplacian), involving a parametric reaction and an undetermined source term. Applying a recent abstract critical point theorem of Ricceri, we prove existence of a solution for a convenient source and small enough parameters.

AI.tldr: 应用Ricceri的抽象临界点定理，证明了混合算子椭圆方程在适当源项和足够小参数下解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究由拉普拉斯算子与分数阶拉普拉斯算子之和驱动的混合型椭圆方程，该方程涉及参数化反应项和未确定源项，旨在证明在适当条件下解的存在性
AI.techniques: 主要应用Ricceri的抽象临界点定理，结合变分方法和临界点理论处理混合算子椭圆方程
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于适当的源项和足够小的参数，具有齐次Dirichlet边界条件的混合型椭圆方程解的存在性
AI.significance: 为混合算子椭圆方程的理论研究提供了新的存在性结果，扩展了临界点理论在非局部方程中的应用，对理解混合型算子的数学性质有重要意义

title: Quasilinear elliptic systems: p-laplacian systems
comment: Keywords: Subcritical nonlinearities, gradient elliptic systems, Dirichlet boundary conditions, quasilinear elliptic equations, nonsmooth critical point theory

AI.tldr: 研究拟线性椭圆系统的弱解存在性和正则性，证明存在无穷多个有界弱解
AI.motivation: 研究一类拟线性椭圆系统，该系统具有非标准结构，包含系数矩阵A_k依赖于解u_k及其梯度，以及非线性源项g_k依赖于所有分量u。这类系统出现在变分问题和物理模型中，需要处理非光滑临界点理论。
AI.techniques: 使用非光滑临界点理论工具，特别是处理非光滑泛函的临界点理论；利用W₀^{1,p}(Ω) ∩ L^∞(Ω; ℝ^d)空间框架；处理拟线性椭圆系统的变分结构。
AI.main_theorems: 证明在W₀^{1,p}(Ω) ∩ L^∞(Ω; ℝ^d)空间中存在无穷多个弱解；建立解的正则性结果；处理系数矩阵A_k依赖于解及其梯度的非标准拟线性结构。
AI.significance: 扩展了拟线性椭圆系统的存在性理论，特别是处理非光滑临界点的情况；为具有非标准结构的椭圆系统提供了新的存在性结果；在变分问题和物理应用中有潜在应用价值。

title: Fractional higher differentiability of solutions to the stationary Orlicz-Stokes system
summary: This work concerns the stationary Stokes system subject to Orlicz type growth conditions. Fractional regularity properties of the symmetric gradient of local solutions are established, depending on a balance between the nonlinearity of the differential operator and the degree of integrability of the right-hand side in Orlicz spaces. This regularity is described via the membership of a non linear expression of the symmetric gradient in Besov spaces. The fractional regularity of the pressure term is also exhibited and is formulated in terms of Orlicz-Besov spaces. Parallel results for the symmetric gradient of local solutions to the associated plain elliptic system are also offered. A new version of a Poincaré-Sobolev inequality in Orlicz spaces, in modular form, on domains with finite measure plays a role in the proofs.

AI.tldr: 建立了Orlicz型增长条件下稳态Stokes系统局部解的对称梯度分数阶正则性
AI.motivation: 研究具有Orlicz型增长条件的稳态Stokes系统，这类系统在非牛顿流体力学中具有重要应用，其中微分算子的非线性与右端项在Orlicz空间中的可积性之间存在平衡关系
AI.techniques: 使用Orlicz空间理论、Besov空间分析、Orlicz-Besov空间、Poincaré-Sobolev不等式的Orlicz空间模形式版本
AI.main_theorems: 建立了对称梯度的分数阶正则性（通过非线性表达式在Besov空间中的隶属关系）、压力项的分数阶正则性（在Orlicz-Besov空间中描述）、相关椭圆系统对称梯度的平行结果
AI.significance: 扩展了非牛顿流体力学中Stokes系统的正则性理论，为具有Orlicz型增长条件的偏微分方程提供了新的分析工具，在模形式Poincaré-Sobolev不等式方面有理论创新

title: Multiplicity of solutions for semilinear Robin problems involving sign-changing nonlinearities

AI.tldr: 建立了Robin边界条件下半线性椭圆方程存在两个非负解，并分析了当边界参数趋于0和无穷时解集分别收敛到Neumann和Dirichlet问题解集
AI.motivation: 研究Robin边界条件下半线性椭圆方程解的存在性和多重性，该问题介于Neumann和Dirichlet边界条件之间，具有重要的理论意义
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、上下解方法、拓扑度理论，以及极限分析技术研究边界参数变化时解集的收敛性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对充分大的λ，存在两个非负解，其最大值在(α,β)区间内；2. 当γ→0时解集收敛到Neumann问题解集；3. 当γ→∞时解集收敛到Dirichlet问题解集
AI.significance: 建立了Robin边界问题与Neumann、Dirichlet问题之间的桥梁，揭示了边界参数对解集的连续依赖性，为研究边界条件连续变化提供了理论框架

title: Global Solvability for Involutive Systems on Non-Compact Manifolds
summary: We establish necessary and sufficient conditions for the closedness of the range of a class of first-order differential operators associated with an involutive structure on $M\times\mathbb{T}^m$, where $M$ is a non-compact manifold satisfying suitable geometric assumptions and $\mathbb{T}^m$ is the $m$-dimensional torus. In addition, we prove that a weaker notion of global hypoellipticity ensures the closedness of the range for differential operators on smooth paracompact manifolds, thereby extending to the non-compact setting a result previously obtained by G.~Araújo, I.~Ferra, and L.~Ragognette [J. Anal. Math. 148, No. 1, 85-118, 2022] for compact manifolds.

AI.tldr: 建立了非紧流形上具有环面因子的一类一阶微分算子值域闭性的充要条件，并将全局亚椭圆性与值域闭性的关联推广到非紧情形。
AI.motivation: 研究非紧流形上微分算子的值域闭性问题，特别是具有环面因子和对合结构的算子。该问题源于紧流形上已有结果（Araújo, Ferra, Ragognette 2022），需要将其推广到非紧情形，并建立相应的几何条件。
AI.techniques: 利用对合结构、非紧流形的几何假设、全局亚椭圆性概念、以及环面因子的周期性结构。通过分析算子在乘积流形 M×𝕋^m 上的行为，建立值域闭性的判别准则。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了 M×𝕋^m 上具有对合结构的一阶微分算子值域闭性的充要条件；2. 证明了较弱的全局亚椭圆性概念足以保证光滑仿紧流形上微分算子的值域闭性，将紧流形结果推广到非紧情形。
AI.significance: 扩展了紧流形上微分算子值域闭性的理论到非紧情形，为研究非紧流形上的偏微分方程提供了新的工具。结果对理解算子的Fredholm性质、解的存在性和正则性有重要意义。

title: A global existence result on weak solutions for the 3D Navier-Stokes-plate system with no contact
summary: We consider the three-dimensional fluid-structure interaction system modeling a system consisting of a viscous incompressible fluid and an elastic plate forming its moving upper boundary. The fluid is described by the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations with a free upper boundary that evolves according to the motion of the structure, coupled via the velocity- and stress-matching conditions. We show that under a rather general condition on the initial data, there exists a global-in-time weak solution of the system. In particular, there is no contact between the plate and the bottom boundary.

AI.tldr: 证明了三维流体-结构相互作用系统中全局弱解的存在性，避免了板与底部边界的接触
AI.motivation: 研究三维流体-结构相互作用系统，其中粘性不可压缩流体与弹性板形成运动上边界，流体由带自由上边界的不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程描述，通过速度和应力匹配条件与结构耦合
AI.techniques: 使用弱解理论、能量估计、紧性方法、自由边界处理技术，以及避免接触的几何约束条件
AI.main_theorems: 在相当一般的初始数据条件下，证明了系统全局弱解的存在性，特别地，证明了板与底部边界不会发生接触
AI.significance: 为三维流体-结构相互作用问题提供了严格的数学基础，解决了自由边界Navier-Stokes方程与弹性板耦合的全局适定性问题，对生物力学和工程应用有重要意义

title: Large $n$-limit of matrix control problems and non-commutative controls
summary: Building on the free-probability stochastic control framework introduced in arXiv:2502.17329, we connect optimal control problems for $n \times n$ random matrix ensembles with their infinite-dimensional, free-probability analogues. Under natural convexity hypotheses, we prove that the non-commutative value function captures the large-$n$ limit of the corresponding finite-matrix control problems. As an application, we give a new perspective on the Laplace principle for convex functionals in the theory of large deviations for random matrices.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了随机矩阵最优控制问题与自由概率理论之间的桥梁，证明了非交换值函数在自然凸性条件下捕捉了有限矩阵控制问题的大n极限。
AI.motivation: 研究动机源于将随机矩阵理论中的最优控制问题与自由概率理论框架联系起来。核心问题是理解有限维随机矩阵控制问题在大n极限下的行为，以及如何用无限维的自由概率理论来描述这种极限行为。
AI.techniques: 主要技术包括：自由概率随机控制框架（基于arXiv:2502.17329）、凸分析、大偏差理论中的拉普拉斯原理、随机矩阵极限理论，以及有限维与无限维控制问题之间的渐近对应方法。
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：在自然凸性假设下，证明了非交换值函数（自由概率框架中的值函数）确实捕捉了相应有限矩阵控制问题的大n极限。这意味着无限维自由概率控制问题的解描述了有限维随机矩阵控制问题的渐近行为。
AI.significance: 理论意义重大：1）为随机矩阵理论中的最优控制问题提供了新的分析框架；2）建立了有限维随机矩阵控制与无限维自由概率控制之间的严格对应关系；3）为随机矩阵大偏差理论中的凸泛函拉普拉斯原理提供了新的视角；4）连接了随机控制、自由概率和随机矩阵理论三个重要数学领域。

title: Resolving Sharp Gradients of Unstable Singularities to Machine Precision via Neural Networks
summary: Recent work introduced a robust computational framework combining embedded mathematical structures, advanced optimization, and neural network architecture, leading to the discovery of multiple unstable self-similar solutions for key fluid dynamics equations, including the Incompressible Porous Media (IPM) and 2D Boussinesq systems. While this framework confirmed the existence of these singularities, an accuracy level approaching double-float machine precision was only achieved for stable and 1st unstable solutions of the 1D Córdoba-Córdoba-Fontelos model. For highly unstable solutions characterized by extreme gradients, the accuracy remained insufficient for validation. The primary obstacle is the presence of sharp solution gradients. Those gradients tend to induce large, localized PDE residuals during training, which not only hinder convergence, but also obscure the subtle signals near the origin required to identify the correct self-similar scaling parameter lambda of the solutions. In this work, we introduce a gradient-normalized PDE residual re-weighting scheme to resolve the high-gradient challenge while amplifying the critical residual signals at the origin for lambda identification. Coupled with the multi-stage neural network architecture, the PDE residuals are reduced to the level of round-off error across a wide spectrum of unstable self-similar singularities previously discovered. Furthermore, our method enables the discovery of new highly unstable singularities, i.e. the 4th unstable solution for IPM equations and a novel family of highly unstable solitons for the Nonlinear Schrödinger equations. This results in achieving high-gradient solutions with high precision, providing an important ingredient for bridging the gap between numerical discovery and computer-assisted proofs for unstable phenomena in nonlinear PDEs.

AI.tldr: 提出梯度归一化残差加权方案，结合多阶段神经网络架构，实现高梯度不稳定自相似奇点的高精度计算与发现
AI.motivation: 现有计算框架在处理高梯度不稳定自相似解时精度不足，尖锐梯度导致训练中PDE残差局部过大，阻碍收敛并掩盖原点附近识别自相似参数λ的关键信号
AI.techniques: 梯度归一化PDE残差加权方案、多阶段神经网络架构、高精度数值优化、自相似参数λ识别技术
AI.main_theorems: 1) 实现IPM方程第4不稳定解的高精度计算；2) 发现非线性薛定谔方程新族高度不稳定孤子；3) 将PDE残差降至舍入误差水平，覆盖广泛不稳定自相似奇点谱
AI.significance: 为不稳定非线性PDE现象的数值发现与计算机辅助证明搭建桥梁，提供高梯度解的高精度计算方法，推动流体动力学奇点理论发展

title: Non-radiative solutions and long-time dynamics of 5D focusing energy-critical wave equation in the radial case
comment: 62 pages, 2 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2507.00391
summary: In this article we discuss the long-time dynamics of the radial solutions to the focusing energy-critical wave equation in 5-dimensional space. We give some details about the asymptotic behaviour, topological structure and time evolution of the non-radiative solutions to this equation. As an application we prove a quantitative version of soliton resolution theorem for solutions defined for all time $t>0$, which immediately verifies the soliton resolution conjecture in the radial case, without a priori boundedness assumption on the energy norm of solution as time tends to infinity. The main tool of this work is the radiation theory of wave equations and the major observation of this work is a correspondence between the radiation and the soliton collision behaviour of solutions.

AI.tldr: 证明了5维聚焦能量临界波方程径向解的全时间定量孤子分解定理，无需能量范数有界性假设
AI.motivation: 研究聚焦能量临界波方程的长时间动力学行为，特别是径向解在5维空间中的渐近行为，旨在验证孤子分解猜想
AI.techniques: 波方程的辐射理论，建立辐射与孤子碰撞行为之间的对应关系，分析非辐射解的渐近行为、拓扑结构和时间演化
AI.main_theorems: 证明了全时间定量孤子分解定理，在径向情况下验证了孤子分解猜想，无需解的能量范数在时间趋于无穷时有先验有界性假设
AI.significance: 首次在无需能量范数有界性假设下证明了径向情况的孤子分解猜想，为波方程的长时间动力学提供了新的理论框架，建立了辐射与孤子碰撞之间的深刻联系

title: Results of Fractional Rough Burgers equation in $H^s$ space and its application
summary: In this paper, we study the well-posedness of Fractional Rough Burgers equation driven by space-time noise in $H^s(\m T)$ space. For the higher dissipation $γ\in(\frac{4}{3},2]$, we establish local well-posedness. Global well-posedness is further obtained when $γ$ is restricted to the interval $(\frac{3}{2}, 2]$. For the lower dissipation $γ\in(\frac{5}{4},\frac{4}{3}]$, we use the regularity analysis derivation the para-controlled solution.

AI.tldr: 建立了分数阶粗糙Burgers方程在空间-时间噪声驱动下在H^s空间中的适定性理论
AI.motivation: 研究带空间-时间噪声驱动的分数阶粗糙Burgers方程的适定性问题，该方程结合了分数阶耗散、非线性对流项和随机扰动，是经典Burgers方程在随机和分数阶框架下的推广
AI.techniques: 使用正则性分析和参数控制解方法，针对不同耗散参数范围采用不同的分析框架，包括局部适定性分析和全局适定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 对于高耗散γ∈(4/3,2]建立局部适定性；对于γ∈(3/2,2]进一步建立全局适定性；对于低耗散γ∈(5/4,4/3]通过正则性分析推导参数控制解
AI.significance: 扩展了随机偏微分方程理论，特别是带噪声的非线性耗散方程的适定性分析，为分数阶随机Burgers方程的研究提供了系统的理论框架

title: Entropic Chaos of Mixed Mean-Field Jump Processes
summary: This paper studies a class of mixed mean-field jump processes on an abstract state space $Π$, together with their associated $N$-particle systems. The dynamics consist of the superposition of an independent Markovian component and a bounded mean-field jump interaction; in particular, piecewise deterministic Markov processes (PDMPs) with mean-field interactions are covered by this framework. Under a second-order bounded difference condition on the mean-field jump kernel, we establish entropic propagation of chaos as $N \to \infty$. In particular, we obtain an explicit qualitative bound on the relative entropy between the law of the $N$-particle system and the product measure induced by the mean-field limit. The proof relies on the second-order concentration inequality introduced in Götze and Sambale, 2020.

AI.tldr: 建立了混合平均场跳跃过程及其N粒子系统的熵混沌传播结果，给出了相对熵的显式定性界
AI.motivation: 研究抽象状态空间上的混合平均场跳跃过程及其N粒子系统，这类过程包含独立马尔可夫分量和有界平均场跳跃相互作用，特别涵盖了具有平均场相互作用的PDMPs
AI.techniques: 使用Götze和Sambale(2020)引入的二阶集中不等式，在平均场跳跃核满足二阶有界差分条件下建立熵混沌传播
AI.main_theorems: 在平均场跳跃核满足二阶有界差分条件下，建立了当N→∞时的熵混沌传播，得到了N粒子系统定律与平均场极限诱导的乘积测度之间相对熵的显式定性界
AI.significance: 为混合平均场跳跃过程提供了严格的数学框架和定量收敛结果，特别适用于PDMPs等非扩散过程，对平均场理论和随机过程理论有重要贡献

title: A limsup fast dynamo on $\mathbb{T}^3$
summary: We construct a time-dependent, incompressible, and uniformly-in-time Lipschitz continuous velocity field on $\mathbb{T}^3$ that produces exponential growth of the magnetic energy along a subsequence of times, for every positive value of the magnetic diffusivity. Because this growth is not uniform in time but occurs only along a diverging sequence of times, we refer to the resulting mechanism as a limsup fast dynamo. Our construction is based on suitably rescaled Arnold-Beltrami-Childress (ABC) flows, each supported on long time intervals. The analysis employs perturbation theory to establish continuity of the exponential growth rate with respect to both the initial data and the diffusivity parameter. This proves the weak form of the fast dynamo conjecture formulated by Childress and Gilbert on $\mathbb{T}^3$, but the considerably more challenging version proposed by Arnold on $\mathbb{T}^3$ remains an open problem.

AI.tldr: 构造了在三维环面上产生磁能指数增长的时变不可压缩Lipschitz速度场，证明了Childress-Gilbert形式的快速发电机猜想。
AI.motivation: 快速发电机猜想是磁流体动力学中的核心问题，研究在有限磁扩散系数下磁能能否指数增长。该猜想有两种形式：Childress-Gilbert的弱形式和Arnold的强形式。
AI.techniques: 基于Arnold-Beltrami-Childress(ABC)流的适当缩放构造，采用扰动理论分析指数增长率对初值和扩散系数的连续性。
AI.main_theorems: 构造了在三维环面上产生limsup快速发电机效应的速度场，即磁能沿发散时间子序列指数增长，对任意正磁扩散系数成立。
AI.significance: 证明了Childress-Gilbert形式的快速发电机猜想，为理解天体物理中磁场生成机制提供了重要理论依据，但Arnold形式的更强猜想仍为开放问题。

title: Infinite-dimensional nonlinear stationary Fokker-Planck-Kolmogorov equations
summary: We prove existence of a probability solution to the nonlinear stationary Fokker-Planck-Kolmogorov equation on an infinite dimensional space with a centered Gaussian measure $γ$ with a unit diffusion operator and a drift of the form $-x+v(p,x)$, where $v$ is a bounded mapping with values in the Cameron-Martin space $H$ of $γ$ and $v$ is defined on the space $E\times X$, where is $E$ is the subset of $L^2(γ)$ consisting of probability densities. The equation has the form $L_{b(p,\bullet)} ^*(p\cdot γ)=0$ with $L_{b(p,\bullet)}\varphi =Δ_H \varphi + (b(p,\bullet) , D_{_H}\varphi)_{_H}$, so that the drift coefficient depends on the unknown solution, which makes the equation nonlinear. This dependence is assumed to satisfy a suitable continuity condition. This result is applied to drifts of Vlasov type defined by means of the convolution of a vector field with the solution. In addition, we consider a more general situation where only the components of $v$ are uniformly bounded and prove the existence of a probability solution under some stronger continuity condition on the drift.

AI.tldr: 证明了无限维空间中非线性平稳Fokker-Planck-Kolmogorov方程概率解的存在性，其中漂移系数依赖于未知解本身。
AI.motivation: 研究无限维空间中非线性平稳Fokker-Planck-Kolmogorov方程，这类方程在随机过程、统计力学和概率论中具有重要应用，特别是当漂移系数依赖于解本身时，方程变为非线性，增加了分析难度。
AI.techniques: 使用高斯测度理论、Cameron-Martin空间分析、非线性泛函分析、不动点定理，以及处理Vlasov型漂移的卷积方法。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在适当连续性条件下，具有形式$-x+v(p,x)$漂移的非线性平稳FPK方程概率解的存在性，其中$v$是取值于Cameron-Martin空间的有界映射；进一步推广到$v$分量一致有界的情形。
AI.significance: 为无限维非线性FPK方程提供了严格的存在性理论，特别适用于Vlasov型相互作用系统，对随机过程理论、统计力学和无限维分析有重要贡献。

title: An extension to Banach stackings of the Brezis--Pazy semigroup-convergence theorem, with applications to $λ$-convex gradient flows
summary:
A 1972 theorem by Brezis and Pazy establishes the uniform convergence of nonlinear semigroups generated by $ω$-accretive operators on a Banach space. Our goal is to expand the setting of this theorem to include nonlinear semigroups that are acting on different Banach spaces. This is useful, for example, to prove discrete-to-continuum convergence for graph-based gradient flows. We name the general setting in which our theorem holds a Banach stacking.
  We give three main applications of the extended theorem that are of independent interest. The first establishes uniform convergence of semigroups in a Banach stacking if the generators of the semigroups converge pointwise. The second is a proof of uniform convergence for gradient flows of $Γ$-converging $λ$-convex functions on a Banach stacking of Hilbert spaces; the third a proof of uniform convergence for gradient flows of $Γ$-converging functions that satisfy a convexity condition that was formulated by Bénilan and Crandall in a 1991 publication (and which we term `$P_0$-convexity') on a Banach stacking of $L^p$ spaces, corresponding to the $TL^p$ space introduced by García Trillos and Slepčev in a 2016 paper.

AI.tldr: 将Brezis-Pazy定理推广到不同Banach空间上的非线性半群，建立Banach stacking框架下的统一收敛理论
AI.motivation: Brezis和Pazy在1972年建立了ω-增生算子生成的非线性半群在单一Banach空间上的一致收敛定理，但实际应用中常涉及不同空间上的半群（如图上的梯度流离散到连续收敛），需要将定理推广到更一般的Banach stacking框架
AI.techniques: 引入Banach stacking概念作为推广框架，使用非线性半群理论、Γ-收敛理论、λ-凸性分析，以及Bénilan-Crandall的P₀-凸性条件
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在Banach stacking框架下推广Brezis-Pazy定理；2. 生成元点态收敛时半群的一致收敛；3. Hilbert空间Banach stacking上Γ-收敛λ-凸函数梯度流的一致收敛；4. L^p空间Banach stacking上Γ-收敛P₀-凸函数梯度流的一致收敛
AI.significance: 为离散到连续收敛提供统一理论框架，特别适用于图上的梯度流分析，连接了Γ-收敛与非线性半群理论，扩展了TL^p空间理论的应用范围

title: Existence of solutions and uniform bounds for the stationary semiconductor equations with generation and ionic carriers
summary: We consider a stationary drift-diffusion system with ionic charge carriers and external generation of electron and hole charge carriers. This system arises, among other applications, in the context of semiconductor modeling for perovskite solar cells. Thanks to truncation techniques and iterative energy estimates, we show the existence and uniform upper and lower bounds on the solutions. The dependency of the bounds on the various parameters of the model is investigated numerically on physically relevant test cases.

AI.tldr: 证明了钙钛矿太阳能电池半导体模型中稳态漂移扩散系统解的存在性、一致上下界及其参数依赖性
AI.motivation: 研究钙钛矿太阳能电池半导体建模中的稳态漂移扩散系统，该系统包含离子电荷载流子和外部电子-空穴载流子生成，是半导体器件物理中的重要数学模型
AI.techniques: 截断技术、迭代能量估计、数值分析物理相关测试案例
AI.main_theorems: 证明了系统解的存在性，获得了解的一致上下界，并通过数值方法研究了边界对模型参数的依赖性
AI.significance: 为钙钛矿太阳能电池的半导体建模提供了严格数学基础，对器件优化和参数分析具有重要理论指导意义

title: Sharp Convergence to the Half-Space for Mullins-Sekerka in the Plane
summary: We revisit the HED Method for the Mullins-Sekerka evolution in the plane. We identify a natural notion of distance, intrinsic to the interface itself. Using this distance, the energy, and the dissipation, we develop natural assumptions on the flow and, assuming existence of a solution satisfying these conditions, establish not just the algebraic rate (previously derived by Chugreeva, Otto, and M. G. Westdickenberg) but also the sharp leading order constant for the convergence to the flat limiting interface.

AI.tldr: 该论文为Mullins-Sekerka演化建立了内蕴距离概念，并在适当假设下获得了收敛到平坦界面的精确主导常数。
AI.motivation: 重新审视平面中Mullins-Sekerka演化的HED方法，旨在改进对界面收敛速率的理解，特别是获得精确的主导常数而不仅仅是代数收敛速率。
AI.techniques: HED方法（能量-耗散-距离方法），引入界面内蕴距离概念，结合能量和耗散分析，建立自然假设条件。
AI.main_theorems: 在解满足特定假设条件下，不仅证明了代数收敛速率（改进先前结果），还获得了收敛到平坦界面的精确主导常数。
AI.significance: 为Mullins-Sekerka演化提供了更精细的收敛分析，建立了内蕴几何框架，对界面演化理论和相变动力学有重要理论意义。

title: Logistic elliptic and parabolic problem for the fractional $p$-Laplacian
summary: In this paper we prove existence, uniqueness of weak solutions of the following nonlocal nonlinear logistic equation \begin{equation*} \begin{cases} (-Δ)_p^s u_λ=λu_λ^q - b(x)u_λ^r \quad \text{in} \;Ω,\\ u_λ=0 \quad \text{in} \; ( \mathbb{R}^d \backslash Ω), \\ u_λ>0 \text{ in} \; Ω. \end{cases}\ \end{equation*} We also prove behavior of $u_λ$ with respect to $λ,$ underlining the effect of the nonlocal operator. We then study the associated parabolic problem, proving local and global existence, uniqueness and global behavior such as stabilization, finite time extinction and blow up.

AI.tldr: 研究非局部非线性Logistic方程弱解的存在唯一性及其渐近行为
AI.motivation: 研究带分数阶p-Laplacian算子的非局部非线性Logistic方程，这类方程在种群动力学、相变理论等领域有重要应用，需要分析解的存在性、唯一性及其对参数λ的依赖性
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、单调性技巧、上下解方法、分数阶Sobolev空间理论、非线性半群理论、能量估计和比较原理
AI.main_theorems: 证明了弱解的存在唯一性，分析了解关于参数λ的渐近行为，研究了相应抛物问题的局部和全局存在性、唯一性，以及解的稳定化、有限时间熄灭和爆破等全局行为
AI.significance: 将经典Logistic方程理论推广到非局部情形，揭示了分数阶算子对解行为的影响，为研究非局部反应扩散方程提供了理论框架，在生物数学和材料科学中有应用价值

title: Wasserstein-Łojasiewicz inequalities and asymptotics of McKean-Vlasov equation
summary: We prove convergence to equilibrium for solutions to the McKean-Vlasov (granular media) equation on the flat torus in a genuinely nonconvex setting. Our approach is based on a Wasserstein-Łojasiewicz gradient inequality for the associated free energy, established under mild analyticity assumptions on the confinement and interaction potentials; this yields convergence of the corresponding Wasserstein gradient flow without any convexity assumptions and without postulating log-Sobolev related functional inequalities. We expect this strategy to extend to more general nonconvex Wasserstein gradient flows; in the present work we develop it in the McKean-Vlasov setting, with the Keller-Segel chemotaxis model on the torus as a key application.

AI.tldr: 证明了在平坦环面上McKean-Vlasov方程在非凸情形下的收敛性，基于Wasserstein-Łojasiewicz梯度不等式方法。
AI.motivation: 研究McKean-Vlasov（颗粒介质）方程在平坦环面上的平衡态收敛问题，特别是在非凸设置下。传统方法通常需要凸性假设或log-Sobolev不等式，本文旨在克服这些限制。
AI.techniques: 基于Wasserstein-Łojasiewicz梯度不等式方法，在温和的解析性假设下建立自由能的梯度不等式，从而得到Wasserstein梯度流的收敛性，无需凸性假设或log-Sobolev不等式。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在平坦环面上McKean-Vlasov方程在非凸情形下的收敛性；建立了在温和解析性假设下的Wasserstein-Łojasiewicz梯度不等式；将方法应用于Keller-Segel趋化模型。
AI.significance: 为处理非凸Wasserstein梯度流提供了新框架，突破了传统凸性假设的限制；在Keller-Segel模型等应用中有重要价值；该方法有望推广到更一般的非凸梯度流问题。

title: Convergence and front position for an FKPP-type free boundary problem
summary: The free boundary problem\[ \begin{cases} \partial_tu=\frac{1}{2}Δu+u,\quad &t>0, \, x>L_t,\\ u(t,x)=0,\quad &t>0,\, x\le L_t,\\ \int_{L_t}^{\infty}u(t,y)dy=1,\quad &t> 0,\\ u(t,x)dx \to u_0(dx)&\text{weakly as }t\to 0, \end{cases}\] has long been conjectured to be in the universality class of the so-called FKPP reaction-diffusion equation. It appears naturally as the hydrodynamic limit of a branching-selection particle system, the $N$-BBM. In the present work, we show that for any initial condition $u_0(dx)$ that decays fast enough as $x\to\infty$, the solution of the free boundary problem converges to the minimal travelling wave solution. We further show how the decay of the initial condition precisely determines the position of the free boundary $L_t$ at large times $t$, mirroring the celebrated results of Bramson \cite{Bramson1983} in the context of the FKPP equation. Our conditions for convergence to the minimal travelling wave, and for $L_t$ to have the Bramson asymptotics \[ L_t=\sqrt{2}t-\frac{3}{2\sqrt{2}}\log t+c+o(1)\quad\text{as }t\to\infty,\] are necessary and sufficient. We also apply our results to a more general free boundary problem that depends on a parameter $β$, where we see a transition from \emph{pulled} to \emph{pushed} behaviour (with \emph{pushmi-pullyu} behaviour at the critical value of $β$). We obtain analogous sharp conditions for convergence to the minimal travelling wave, along with precise asymptotics for the front position, in each of these regimes. To our knowledge, such necessary and sufficient conditions had not previously been established in the pushmi-pullyu or pushed regimes, even for classical monostable reaction-diffusion equations. Our results prove and extend non-rigorous predictions in the physics literature of the first author, Brunet and Derrida.

AI.tldr: 建立了自由边界问题收敛到最小行波解的充要条件，并给出了自由边界位置的精确渐近，推广了FKPP方程的Bramson结果。
AI.motivation: 研究一个自由边界问题，该问题作为分支选择粒子系统(N-BBM)的流体力学极限出现，被猜想属于FKPP反应扩散方程的普适类。目标是建立该问题收敛到最小行波解的充要条件，并精确确定自由边界位置的大时间渐近行为。
AI.techniques: 结合自由边界问题分析、行波解理论、大时间渐近分析，以及推广的Bramson型对数修正项推导。特别处理了从"pulled"到"pushed"行为的转变，包括临界情况下的"pushmi-pullyu"行为。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对于衰减足够快的初始条件，自由边界问题的解收敛到最小行波解；2. 初始条件的衰减精确决定了自由边界位置L_t的大时间渐近：L_t = √2 t - (3/(2√2)) log t + c + o(1)；3. 建立了收敛到最小行波解的充要条件；4. 将结果推广到依赖参数β的更一般自由边界问题，涵盖了pulled、pushed和pushmi-pullyu三种行为。
AI.significance: 首次在pushmi-pullyu和pushed区域建立了收敛到最小行波解的充要条件，即使对于经典的单稳态反应扩散方程也属首次。结果验证并扩展了物理学文献中的非严格预测，为自由边界问题和FKPP普适类提供了严格理论基础。
